items.title: OpenAI Launches 3 Real-Time Audio Models
items.summary: GPT-Realtime-2, GPT-Realtime-Translate, and GPT-Realtime-Whisper target voice agents and live transcription.

items.title: NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Nano Omni Now on OCI
items.summary: Open-source multimodal model reasoning across video, audio, images and text available on Oracle Cloud.

items.title: Four Chinese Labs Release Open-Weight Coding Models
items.summary: GLM-5.1, MiniMax M2.7, Kimi K2.6, and DeepSeek V4 match Western frontier at far lower inference cost.

items.title: IBM Granite 4.1 Series Released as Open Models
items.summary: IBM releases Granite 4.1 in 3B, 8B, and 30B sizes with 131K token context windows at no cost.

items.title: Grok 4.3 Available on Oracle OCI Enterprise AI
items.summary: xAI's latest reasoning model hits OCI with 98% on τ²-Bench Telecom and 1M-token context window.

items.title: ChatGPT for Excel & Google Sheets Goes Global
items.summary: ChatGPT Business now offers a spreadsheet-native sidebar for Excel and Google Sheets worldwide.

items.title: Microsoft Outlook May 2026 AI Productivity Update
items.summary: Outlook gets Copilot-powered contextual insights, smarter calendars, and bulk calendar management tools.

items.title: Anthropic Launches 12 Claude Legal Plugins
items.summary: New Claude plugins cover contract, employment, and litigation law, integrating Thomson Reuters CoCounsel.

items.title: ChatGPT for Intune Launches on Apple App Store
items.summary: New enterprise iOS app lets IT teams apply Microsoft Intune and Entra policies to ChatGPT mobile.

items.title: Google Hires Hundreds of Forward Deployed Engineers
items.summary: Google staffing up engineers to help enterprise customers adopt its business-focused AI products.

items.title: Google, Microsoft & xAI Grant US Gov Pre-Release AI Access
items.summary: CAISI will evaluate frontier AI models for national security risks before public launch.

items.title: Pentagon Signs AI Deals with 7 Tech Giants, Excludes Anthropic
items.summary: SpaceX, OpenAI, Google, Microsoft, Nvidia, AWS, Oracle gain classified AI contracts; Anthropic left out.

items.title: Meta Developing Agentic AI Assistant Powered by Muse Spark
items.summary: Meta building autonomous AI assistant and testing 'Hatch' internal agent with Instagram shopping integration.

items.title: OpenAI Expands to AWS, Ends Microsoft Exclusivity
items.summary: OpenAI renegotiates partnership with Microsoft, now distributing models via Amazon and Google clouds.

items.title: OpenAI Rolls Out Advertising in ChatGPT
items.summary: ChatGPT begins serving ads to help users discover products, with privacy protections pledged by OpenAI.
